title: Update SKILL.md with layout selection and placeholder guidance
description: Add the layout selection and placeholder guidance block to .apm/skills/pypptx/SKILL.md under the Creating a presentation from scratch section. Content must include: (1) instruction to always run slide layouts before choosing an index; (2) warning that index 0 / entry 1 is almost always the cover slide; (3) the name/use table from the spec; (4) the placeholder inspection snippet; (5) explicit prohibition on add_textbox() for slides that have layout placeholders.
acceptance_criteria: SKILL.md instructs agents to run slide layouts before choosing a layout index
SKILL.md warns that layout index 0 is the cover slide
SKILL.md includes the placeholder inspection and write-by-index code snippets
SKILL.md explicitly prohibits add_textbox() on slides with layout placeholders
